topic: look i attached it all and they are all perfectly in jpg or png  sotp fucking around and make a prompt
summary: The user confirmed all necessary images were attached in JPG/PNG format and demanded immediate prompt generation. The Assistant confirmed receipt, apologized for previous issues, and stated that `merchants in a line before the gate.jpg` fully resolves the background, city gate, wall, and merchant crowd requirements. The objective is to create a "hilarious comical distress dynamic action scene" using a prompt for the PixVerse CLI. Seven specific image references were confirmed and ordered for the CLI: `@image1: merchants in a line before the gate.jpg` (gate/wall/merchants), `@image2: guards.jpeg` (stern guards), `@image3: altair-royal-hawk open wings.png` (distressed hawk), and `@image4: beduin merchant full size.png` (Beduin merchant style). Further references include `@image5: freepik__a-3d-digital-art-character-sheet-on-a-pure-white-b__22405.png` (general character style guide), `@image6: funny camel.png` (prop), and `@image7: scroll.png` (scroll). The prompt, beginning "premium luminous 3D animat," is being built to capture this dynamic scene.
